description: Interactive content that prompts followers to choose or identify with different personality types or dining personas, creating engagement through self-reflection and choice.
structural_recipe: Post a visual or carousel showing 2-4 distinct personality archetypes (e.g., romantic, adventurous, casual, luxe diner). Use a direct Arabic question asking 'Which personality do you choose today?' with relevant hashtags. Include emoji for visual appeal. Encourage followers to comment or react with their choice.
why_it_works: Saudis engage with content that invites personal choice and self-expression. Identity-based questions create psychological investment and encourage followers to publicly declare preferences, strengthening community connection and driving comment engagement.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure personality categories are culturally appropriate and align with Saudi social values
Avoid personality types that conflict with religious or conservative norms
Test with local audience before broad deployment
